name: Pandero
description: Octavia's pistol hammers foes with single shots or a rapid volley of bullets. When wielded by Octavia, alt-fire Headshot Kills increase Reload Speed.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Octavia's pistol hammers foes with single shots or a rapid volley of bullets. When wielded by Octavia, alt-fire Headshot Kills increase Reload Speed.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Lua’s Prey: Baruuk Prime: Hotfix 32.2.5
patchlogs.changes:
Pandero Prime
Replaced Perrin Sequence Rank 4 sacrifice of Pandero Prime Receiver to Magnus Prime Barrel.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Update 31.7
patchlogs.changes: Replaced Perrin Sequence sacrifice of Panthera Prime Receiver to Pandero Prime Receiver.

patchlogs.name: Octavia Prime: Hotfix 29.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Pandero Prime's model reverting to the regular version while Dual Wielding.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Pandero Secondary Fire Codex/Arsenal description saying ‘Charged Shot’ when it is actually a ‘Burst Shot’.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.15.1
patchlogs.changes: Slightly adjusted the hand position when holding the Pandero Ceramica Skin to make it sit nicer in the Warframe's hand.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed floating clip when reloading the Pandero equipped with the Ceramica Skin.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed bullets from Pandero’s Alt Fire coming from the holster position and not the gun when performing a Melee slide attack.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of Pandero alt fire in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Pandero’s alt fire bullets shooting from the holster position after a melee slide attack.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Pandero’s reload sounds being too loud.
Fixed missing Pandero reload sounds when using it in Dual-Wield.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to shoot with the Pandero when downed, except when using alt-fire or when scoped.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Pandero in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
This fan hammer pistol, like the Tenora, also has two firing modes. Its semi-automatic primary fire will please sharpshooters. Its alt fire packs a punch (several) by emptying its entire clip in one trigger pull, but hold steady, the shots also have some kick to them. The Pandero can be purchased in the Market for Platinum or you can purchase its Blueprint in the Market for crafting.
Azima, Euphona Prime, Kulstar, Pandero, Talons
